skill.name: qwen-image-2-pro
skill.description: Generate images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro via inference.sh CLI. Professional text rendering, fine-grained realism, enhanced semantic adherence. Ideal for posters, banners, and text-heavy designs. Triggers: qwen image pro, qwen-image-pro, qwen 2 pro, alibaba image pro, dashscope pro, professional text rendering
skill.summary: Professional image generation with Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro via inference.sh CLI. Specializes in text rendering and complex visual designs.
skill.author: inference-shell

security_audit.summary: All 56 static findings are false positives. The skill is a legitimate image generation tool using Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro via inference.sh CLI. External command flags are Markdown code fences (```bash), network flags are legitimate service URLs, and cryptographic/reconnaissance flags are misidentified parameter names (prompt, seed).

high_findings.title: False Positive: External Commands
high_findings.description: Scanner flagged 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' at multiple lines - these are Markdown code block fences (```bash), not actual shell execution. The skill is documentation-only with example commands.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: The backticks are Markdown syntax for code blocks, not Ruby backtick execution. This is a well-documented false positive pattern.

high_findings.title: False Positive: Hardcoded URLs
high_findings.description: Scanner flagged hardcoded URLs - these are legitimate service references (inference.sh) and documentation links expected for a cloud-based API service.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: URLs point to the inference.sh service and official documentation - expected for this type of skill.

high_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
high_findings.description: Scanner incorrectly flagged 'weak cryptographic algorithm' - this is a misclassification of words like 'prompt' and parameter names containing 'crypt' substring.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: The skill contains no cryptographic code. Scanner is misidentifying 'prompt', 'crypt' in 'encrypt', etc. as crypto issues - classic false positive.

high_findings.title: False Positive: System Reconnaissance
high_findings.description: Scanner flagged 'seed' parameter as system reconnaissance - this is a random seed for reproducible image generation, not system scanning.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: The 'seed' parameter is for random seed in image generation to get reproducible results - standard ML/AI parameter, not reconnaissance.

content.value_statement: Create high-quality images with professional text rendering using Alibaba's Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model. Perfect for posters, banners, and designs requiring precise text control.
actual_capabilities: Generate images from text prompts using Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model
Render professional-quality text within images (titles, banners, posters)
Create multiple image variations from a single prompt
Edit images using reference images for style transfer
Generate reproducible results with seed parameter
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI and valid account credentials
Reference images limited to 3 images for editing

use_cases.title: Marketing and Design Teams
use_cases.description: Create professional marketing materials, banners, and promotional images with precise text rendering for campaigns.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing designers needing text-heavy visual content

use_cases.title: Content Creators
use_cases.description: Generate custom posters, thumbnails, and social media graphics with accurate text placement and styling.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content creators

use_cases.title: Developers and Prototypers
use_cases.description: Quickly generate visual mockups and prototype designs with embedded text for presentations and demos.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Image Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an image of a futuristic cityscape at sunset with flying cars between buildings
prompt_templates.scenario: Simple text-to-image generation for general purposes

prompt_templates.title: Text-Heavy Poster Design
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a poster with the title "Grand Opening" in large red serif font at the top center. Below, add the date "March 15, 2024" in smaller black text. Use an elegant gold and white gradient background with a professional, clean, modern style.
prompt_templates.scenario: Designing event posters with precise text control

prompt_templates.title: Marketing Banner with Specific Dimensions
prompt_templates.prompt: Professional marketing banner for summer sale. Large text "SUMMER SALE" in white on gradient sunset background. "50% OFF" in yellow below. Clean, modern design.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating marketing materials with custom dimensions

prompt_templates.title: Image Editing with Reference Images
prompt_templates.prompt: Apply the artistic style from the reference image to my product photo while maintaining the product details and composition.
prompt_templates.scenario: Style transfer editing using reference images

output_examples.input: Generate a futuristic cityscape at sunset with flying cars
output_examples.output: A stunning cityscape image with tall skyscrapers silhouetted against an orange and purple sunset sky. Several flying vehicles navigate between the buildings with glowing trails.

output_examples.input: Poster with title "Welcome!" in bold blue text at top for a children's party
output_examples.output: A colorful party poster featuring "Welcome!" in large, bold blue cartoon-style text at the top. Balloons and confetti decorate the background with a cheerful, festive atmosphere.

best_practices: Use quotes around exact text you want rendered in the image for better accuracy
Set prompt_extend to false when you need precise control over text placement and styling
Include negative prompts like "blurry text, distorted text, low quality" to improve text rendering results
anti_patterns: Do not use prompts longer than 800 characters - they will be truncated
Avoid requesting more than 3 reference images for editing - only the first 3 will be used
Do not expect perfect text rendering for very small or complex text - the model works best with clear, prominent text

faq.question: What is Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro and how is it different from standard Qwen-Image?
faq.answer: Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro is Alibaba's professional-grade image generation model optimized for text rendering and complex designs. It provides better text accuracy, finer details, and stronger adherence to complex prompts compared to the standard model.

faq.question: How do I get started with this skill?
faq.answer: First, install the inference.sh CLI using npx skills add inference-sh/skills@agent-tools. Then run infsh login to authenticate. Finally, use infsh app run alibaba/qwen-image-2-pro with your prompt as JSON input.

faq.question: What are the supported image dimensions?
faq.answer: Images can be generated from 512x512 pixels up to 2048x2048 pixels. The total pixel count must stay within these bounds. Common sizes include 1024x1024 for squares, 1920x1080 for banners, and 1024x1536 for posters.

faq.question: Can I generate multiple variations of the same image?
faq.answer: Yes, use the num_images parameter (1-6) to generate multiple variations. Each variation will have different random elements while following the same prompt.

faq.question: How can I get reproducible results?
faq.answer: Use the seed parameter with a specific integer value (0-2147483647). Using the same seed with the same prompt will produce identical results.

faq.question: Can I edit existing images with this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, provide reference images using the reference_images parameter (up to 3 images). You can then describe the edit you want, such as style transfer or combining elements from multiple images.
